subject: The $100M Lead Games (Do you accept?)
body:
Mozination -

Real quick.

There are only 5 days to unlock 2 bonus chapters.

If you don't know I wrote two extra chapters to the $100M Leads book.

They won't be released publicly with the book.

The good news: you can unlock them by bringing 10 friends with you to the free virtual event on the 19th of August.

And - if you're one of the top 10 referrers who invite the most guests, you'll win a private "Ask me Anything" for your audience. You can use it however you want.

Are you up for the challenge?

Would you like two bonus chapters?

Join the $100M Lead Games

Remember: If you introduce something valuable to someone. They associate that value with you.

I've spent over $1,000,000 dollars on this event to make sure it's valuable.

Everyone who attends live will get a secret project I've been working on for 4 years - for free.

I can't tell you what it is yet. But it's worth more than a gift card and less than a Tesla.

For everyone there - who turns up live - I promise it will be worth it.

You have my word.

Thanks #mozination.

I can't wait until you see the live virtual event.

Alex

PS - There's no pressure to share. None at all.

But if you do decide to join the $100M Lead Games and help spread the word, I'd like to give you a small gift to give you an edge: the Affiliate Black Book.

It has a bunch of insider intel and stuff that'll help you get more folks in this world.

When you sign up, you'll get it delivered to your inbox.

Go here to become an affiliate now

May the odds be ever in your favor.
